Name: m15_ShadowBank
Description: Determines the parameters for shadow maps.

Fields.Name: Light Source: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal angle of the light source affecting this shadow map. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Light Source: Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical angle of the light source affecting this shadow map. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Shadow Density %
Fields.Description: The density of the shadow map. 100% is the darkest value.

Fields.Name: Shadow Color: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the coloring for the shadow map.

Fields.Name: Shadow Color: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the coloring for the shadow map.

Fields.Name: Shadow Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the coloring for the shadow map.

Fields.Name: Shadow Start Distance
Fields.Description: The start distance for the shadow map. 0 means the camera's near clip is used. In metres.

Fields.Name: Shadow End Distance
Fields.Description: The end distance for the shadow map.  In metres.

Fields.Name: Automatic Far Clip Adjustment Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to shorten the end distance by when facing the light source direction.

Fields.Name: Shadow Fade Start Distance
Fields.Description: The start distance for fading the shadow map. In metres.

Fields.Name: Shadow Fade End Distance
Fields.Description: The end distance for fading the shadow map. In metres.

Fields.Name: Shadow Depth Offset
Fields.Description: The z-offset for the shadow map. Negative values reduce the amount of self-shadowing that occurs.

Fields.Name: Perspective Adjustment
Fields.Description: Adjusts the perspective of the shadow map. Negative values reduce the perspective, vice versa.

Fields.Name: Shadow Volume Depth
Fields.Description: The depth of the shadow volume for this shadow map. Increase value for large objects.
